Title: การเก็บเงินบางส่วน (Partial capture)
Content:
<style> p[data-block-id] {font-size:1rem;} ul li p[data-block-id] {margin-bottom: 0;} ul[data-type="taskList"] li div p[data-block-id] {margin-bottom: 0;} ol li p[data-block-id] {margin-bottom: 0;} table tbody th p[data-block-id] { margin-bottom: 0;} blockquote p[data-block-id] {margin-bottom: 0 !important;}  p[data-block-id]:empty::after {content: "\00A0";} </style>Please provide the English text you would like me to translate into Thai.

I am ready to translate your technical documentation, specializing in fintech, while adhering to all the specified requirements:

*   **Tone:** Professional, clear, and technical.
*   **Product Names:** Kept in English (e.g., "Xendit", "Invoice").
*   **Technical Terms:** Kept in English (e.g., API, webhook, JSON).
*   **Code Blocks:** Untranslated.
*   **Formatting:** All HTML tags, Markdown, placeholders, and structure preserved exactly.
*   **HTML Attributes:** All attributes and their values (including `data-block-id`, `class`, `href`, `src`, etc.) must be preserved exactly as they appear in the source.
